response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer but lacks the specialized hardware and AI-accelerator background required for a Principal Performance Architect role. No experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, deep learning workload optimization, SIMD/MIMD, or hardware-software co-design. Background is in web, mobile, and backend services rather than cloud infrastructure for AI accelerators.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience across multiple languages and stacks
Some low-latency, high-performance backend work with DLang at Dunnhumby
Brief C/C++ experience at National Instruments on measurement tooling
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware architecture experience
No deep learning, GPU, or AI accelerator workload optimization background
Educational path (BS + ~14 years) is in general SWE, not hardware/performance architecture

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or deep learning optimization experience
